title: FluxState Change-Log Store Manifest
description: Authoritative commit record for a <name>.flux/ store. Readers trust only files listed here.

store_name.description: Logical name of the tracked table/view (the <name> in <name>.flux/).

events.description: Ordered list of committed event files. ONLY these are valid history.

file.description: Path relative to the store root, e.g. 'events/20260605T143000Z.parquet'.

snapshot_id.description: Content-derived id of the capture that produced this file (idempotency).

ts_min.description: Earliest event timestamp in the file (UTC) — for file-skip time-travel.

ts_max.description: Latest event timestamp in the file (UTC).

row_count.description: Number of change events in the file.

checkpoints.description: Materialized point-in-time snapshots. Empty in P1 (fast-follow).
